Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 1, 092 [Enuma Anu Enlil 56][via cams/gkab]

flake
flake 1flake 1

* mulUDU.IDIM ina KASKAL šu-ut dEN.LIL₂.LA₂ GUB ⸢KUR₂ kurURI⸣[ki ...]

(If) a planet stands in the Path of Those of Enlil: an enemy [...] Akkad [...].

flake 22

* mulUDU.IDIM GU₄.U₄ dṣal-bat-a-nu MU-[šu₂ ša₂]-ru-ru iš-⸢ši⸣ [...]

(If) a planet whose name is Mercury (or) Mars is imbued with brilliance: [...].

flake 33

* mulUDU.IDIM u mulTI₈mušen it-ten₂-tu-u₂ [...]

(If) a planet and the Eagle keep moving parallel (to each other): [...].

flake 44

* mulUDU.IDIM u mulTI₈mušen it-ten-mi-du [...]

(If) a planet and the Eagle touch each other: [...].

flake 55

* mulUDU.IDIM u mulTI₈mušen iṭ-ḫu-u₂ [...]

(If) a planet and the Eagle approach each other: [...].

flake 66

* mulUDU.IDIM u mula-ru₆ : mul⸢a-ḫu⸣-[u₂ ...]

(If) a planet and the Frond (or): the Alien star [...].

flake 77

* mulUDU.IDIM u mula-ru₆ : ⸢mul⸣[a-ḫu-u₂ ...]

(If) a planet and the Frond (or): the Alien star [...].

(traces of 1 line)
(rest of surface missing)
